cards.title: About the Planets Part 2
cards.content: There are five officially recognized dwarf planets in our solar system: Ceres, Pluto, Haumea, Makemake, and Eris.","keywords":"Planets, solar system, Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune, Pluto, Ceres, Eris, Haumea, Makemake","@type":"Article","author":{"@id":"https://science.nasa.gov/author/minhtran/","name":"Lindsey Tran"},"datePublished":"2023-07-10T16:29:50-04:00","dateModified":"2026-02-03T21:17:14-05:00","image":{"@id":"https://science.nasa.gov/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/planets3x3-pluto-colormercury-axis-tilt-nolabels-1080p.00001-print.jpg"},"name":"About the Planets","@id":"https://science.nasa.gov/solar-system/planets/#schema-5958115","isPartOf":{"@id":"https://science.nasa.gov/solar-system/planets/#webpage"},"publisher":{"@id":"https://science.nasa.gov/#organization"},"inLanguage":"en-US","mainEntityOfPage":{"@id":"https://science.nasa.gov/solar-system/
